query: SELECT t.id as tabId, t.tableId, t.status as tabStatus, tb.number as tableNumber, tb.status as tableStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tabItems WHERE tabId = t.id) as itemCount FROM tabs t JOIN tables tb ON t.tableId = tb.id WHERE t.status = 'open';
